---
title: "data_check"
format: html
---

# 生成AIに関連する求人数の推移(2023年)

![画像](unnamed (1).png)
![画像](unnamed (2).png)
![画像](unnamed (3).png)

[出典](https://www.hiringlab.org/jp/blog/2023/08/29/%E6%96%B0%E8%88%88%E5%8A%B4%E5%83%8D%E5%B8%82%E5%A0%B4%EF%BC%9A%E7%94%9F%E6%88%90ai%E3%81%AB%E9%96%A2%E9%80%A3%E3%81%99%E3%82%8B%E8%81%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%B0%E9%A0%AD/)


# 情報通信業雇用数の推移
```{r}
#install.packages("readxl")
```

```{r}
library(readxl)

df <- read_excel("lt01-c30 (1).xlsx")

write.csv(
  df,
  "01data.csv",
  row.names = FALSE,
  fileEncoding = "UTF-8"
)
```
```{r}
library(readr)
df <- read_csv("01data.csv",
               skip = 6,
               show_col_types = FALSE)
```

```{r}
head(df)
str(df)
```
```{r}

colSums(is.na(df))

df_clean <- df |> tidyr::drop_na()

```


```{r}
colnames(df)
```
```{r}
summary(df)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(df, aes(y = "情報通信業")) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "外れ値の確認", y = "値")
```
